docs.text: Nicholas McCarthy ¶ Applied scientist, researcher, and technical lead working at the intersection of machine learning research, engineering, and real-world deployment. I build and lead AI systems in regulated, multi-stakeholder environments where technical depth, delivery discipline, and governance all matter. Current focus ¶ Senior Research Fellow and Deputy PI / Technical Lead at UCD Horizon Europe digital health delivery (SMASH-HCM) AI systems, multimodal data infrastructure, and reproducible ML pipelines What I work on ¶ Machine learning and deep learning systems Medical imaging and computer vision Multimodal data platforms (imaging, clinical, genomic) Knowledge graphs and knowledge-based AI Research-to-product translation and technical strategy Explore ¶ Projects Publications Contact ¶ GitHub LinkedIn
docs.title: Home

docs.text: Applied scientist, researcher, and technical lead working at the intersection of machine learning research, engineering, and real-world deployment. I build and lead AI systems in regulated, multi-stakeholder environments where technical depth, delivery discipline, and governance all matter.
docs.title: Nicholas McCarthy

docs.text: Senior Research Fellow and Deputy PI / Technical Lead at UCD Horizon Europe digital health delivery (SMASH-HCM) AI systems, multimodal data infrastructure, and reproducible ML pipelines
docs.title: Current focus

docs.text: Machine learning and deep learning systems Medical imaging and computer vision Multimodal data platforms (imaging, clinical, genomic) Knowledge graphs and knowledge-based AI Research-to-product translation and technical strategy
docs.title: What I work on

docs.text: Projects ¶ Open Source and Engineering ¶ AmpliGraph - Open source Python library for link prediction and representation learning on knowledge graphs. PathXL Algorithm Framework - Scalable plugin framework and utility suite for digital pathology image analysis, implemented in C++11 with OpenCV and OpenMP. WekaLab - Matlab library for working with the Weka machine learning framework. Applied Research Highlights ¶ Weakly supervised deep learning for ACL tear segmentation and classification with radiologist-level performance. Differential privacy approaches for network generation and knowledge graph protection. Knowledge graph and latent-space methods for molecule discovery and counterfactual explanations.
docs.title: Projects

docs.text: AmpliGraph - Open source Python library for link prediction and representation learning on knowledge graphs. PathXL Algorithm Framework - Scalable plugin framework and utility suite for digital pathology image analysis, implemented in C++11 with OpenCV and OpenMP. WekaLab - Matlab library for working with the Weka machine learning framework.
